onBoarding.marketing_title_1: Connect and engage with your customers. Anytime, anywhere
onBoarding.marketing_desc_1: Communicate with customers or prospects through a wide selection of feedback channels at every touchpoint anywhere, no matter the device.
onBoarding.marketing_title_2: Take full control of your customer’s journey
onBoarding.marketing_desc_2: Analyze your customer’s 360 experience and quickly identify actionable insights and trends.
onBoarding.marketing_title_3: Manage real-time analytics in one dashboard
onBoarding.marketing_desc_3: Easily monitor your business with the role-based, customizable dashboard from anywhere.
onBoarding.marketing_desc_4: Prioritize actions quickly based on customer data to excel their expectations with our closed-loop feedback system with real-time alerts.
onBoarding.marketing_desc_5: Identify your best customers and help them become your brand ambassadors through social referrals with our unique Promoter Amplification system.
